item.title: SUPERNOVA REBOOT 那週末到底發生了什麼事？
item.author: Gordon Yeung
item.content:encoded:
*記得開啟CC字幕 第一次放棄農曆新年，跑到日本看星街演唱會⋯ 結果當然是超級值得🙇🏻‍♂️各種Offkai /表演/ 聯成活動，多不勝數，是滿滿的星街✨ 幸好選擇有來
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/gordonyeung314/ X：https://x.com/hky_gordon

item.title: I Went to the Hololive Snow Party Collab Event
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Party Time" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks
▼Related Videos▼ Yukihana Lamy 「Fleur」: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kU-KWiNpRmw
▼Related Links▼ Official site: https://atfes.com/contents/snowparty
Timestamps 0:00 - Intro 1:30 - Puzzle game 2:14 - Key visual & mini games 3:08 - MV theatre 3:33 - Foods and drinks 4:36 - Goods 5:18 - Final thoughts
